title: Japanese-Style Okonomiyaki
description: A savory pancake from Japan, filled with gooey cheese and mixed vegetables. Perfect as a snack or light meal.

ingredients.name: Batter Mix
ingredients.notes: Store-bought or homemade okonomiyaki batter mix

instructions: In a large bowl, combine the batter mix and 1/2 cup of water. Mix until smooth.
Add the shredded cabbage and mixed vegetables to the bowl and mix well.
Heat a non-stick pan or okonomiyaki pan over medium heat.
Add a small amount of oil to the pan and pour in the batter mix mixture.
Cook for 2-3 minutes or until the bottom is golden brown.
Add the shredded cheese on top of the batter mix.
Cook for another 2-3 minutes or until the cheese is melted and the bottom is golden brown.
Use a spatula to flip the okonomiyaki over and cook for another 2-3 minutes or until the other side is golden brown.
Serve the okonomiyaki hot with okonomiyaki sauce.
